title: 12 Managing Foreign Exchange Spreads in Wires
body_text:
12	Managing Foreign Exchange Spreads in Wires
12.1	Overview of Managing Foreign Exchange Spreads in Wires
Authorized Wires Users can view, add, modify, or delete foreign exchange spreads in Wires. Wires Users must have the MTS 芒聙聹Spreads and Fees芒聙聺 permission assigned to  access the Spreads function. See Section 8.6, Creating a Wires User in MTS.
You can set foreign exchange spreads by currency classification (major, minor, exotic, and pegged) and/or by individual currency. Spreads that are set by individual currency override spreads set by currency classification.
Foreign exchange spreads are automatically calculated into the amount of outgoing wires sent in foreign currencies.
12.2	Viewing Foreign Exchanging Spreads in Wires
Authorized Wires Users view foreign exchange spreads as follows:
Log in to Wires as described in Chapter 10, Logging in to Wires.
Select
Spreads
. See Figure 1.
Figure 1: Select Spreads Option
View the configured spreads on the Organization Spreads page. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Organization Spreads Page
12.3 	Adding Foreign Exchange Spreads in Wires
Authorized Wires Users add foreign exchange spreads as follows:
Go to the Organization Spreads page as described in Section 12.2, Viewing Foreign Exchange Spreads in Wires.
Select the arrow beside the currency classification or individual currency as appropriate. See Figure 3.
Figure 3: Select the Currency or Currency Classification
Enter the spread or use the arrows to select a value in the Spread field. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Enter the Spread
Select the appropriate spread type option in the Type drop-down menu. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: Select the Spread Type
Select the green check mark to save the spread. See Figure 6. Alternatively, select the red 芒聙聹X芒聙聺 to clear the entered data.
Figure 6: Saving the Spread
12.4	Modifying Foreign Exchange Spreads in Wires
Authorized Wires Users modify foreign exchange spreads as follows:
Go to the Organization Spreads page as described in Section 12.2, Viewing Foreign Exchange Spreads in Wires.
Select the arrow beside the appropriate currency classification or individual currency. See Figure 7.
Figure 7: Select the Currency or Currency Classification
Update the value in the Spread and/or Type field as required. See Figure 8.
Figure 8: Update the Spread
Select the green ticked box to save the change. See Figure 9. Alternatively, select the red 芒聙聹X芒聙聺 to cancel the change.
Figure 9: Save the Updated Spread
12.5 	Deleting Foreign Exchange Spreads in Wires
Authorized Wires Users delete foreign exchange spreads as follows:
Go to the Organization Spreads page as described in Section 12.2, Viewing Foreign Exchange Spreads in Wires.
Select the trash can beside the applicable currency classification or individual currency. See Figure 10.
Figure 10: Deleting a Spread
Select the green check mark to delete the spread. See Figure 11. Alternatively, select the red 芒聙聹X芒聙聺 to cancel the deletion.
Figure 11: Deleting a Spread
END
